package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for test_helpers_duplicated_across_packages: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Near-identical helper builders or setup code duplicated across test packages.
type CaseTestHelpersDuplicatedAcrossPackagesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTestHelpersDuplicatedAcrossPackagesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTestHelpersDuplicatedAcrossPackagesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTestHelpersDuplicatedAcrossPackagesModel
}

type CaseTestHelpersDuplicatedAcrossPackagesService struct {
    repo *CaseTestHelpersDuplicatedAcrossPackagesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTestHelpersDuplicatedAcrossPackagesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveTestHelpersDuplicatedAcrossPackages(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTestHelpersDuplicatedAcrossPackagesDTO) error {
    focus := "test_helpers_duplicated_across_packages"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    testCase := struct { name string; raw string }{"full stack", input}
    _ = (*testing.T)(nil)
    _ = testCase
    test_helpers_duplicated_across_packages_positive := map[string]int{"test": 1, "helpers": 2, "duplicated": 3, "across": 4, "packages": 5}
    test_helpers_duplicated_across_packages_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    test_positive_0 := test_helpers_duplicated_across_packages_positive["test"] + len(input)
    _ = test_positive_0
    helpers_positive_1 := test_helpers_duplicated_across_packages_positive["helpers"] + len(input)
    _ = helpers_positive_1
    duplicated_positive_2 := test_helpers_duplicated_across_packages_positive["duplicated"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicated_positive_2
    across_positive_3 := test_helpers_duplicated_across_packages_positive["across"] + len(input)
    _ = across_positive_3
    packages_positive_4 := test_helpers_duplicated_across_packages_positive["packages"] + len(input)
    _ = packages_positive_4
    return nil
}
